title: Failure, Glitch, or Refusal Game
genericDescription: Use failure as expressive form; design productive friction; support players through unusual interaction.
specificDescription: Build a game where failure, glitch, refusal, broken automation, unstable memory, or impossible desire is central. The game must still be intentionally playable and finishable.
gradingRubric: 30 pts expressive failure design; 20 pts intentionality; 20 pts finishability; 15 pts track connection; 15 pts reflection.
